content: Horrible customer service. Representative do not understand what your needs are or how to resolve. This experience is very frustrating. I only called to inquire about my bill on 4/28/26. 1st caller frustrated me so I asked to speak to his supervisor- he left me on hold for about 25 minutes until I just hung up. I called back and refused to give detail but kindly asked to speak to a supervisor and that representative HUNG UP ON ME. Called back a 3rd time and was placed on hold for 30 mins.

content: Absolutely TERRIBLE app. Slow to load - if it ever loads - and bloated with attempts to just sell more products and services. I need to use this garbage app to get my garbage printer to clean its printheads, but it takes an inordinate amount of time just to get to the setting!! HP, this is the straw that broke the camel's back. I would urge every user they've duped into paying for monthly ink services to REJECT HP and pick a different option.
